_caveat: BEST-EFFORT selectors, unverified against a live Facebook page. Facebook's DOM is obfuscated and changes without notice. If comment detection stops working, open the Live page in Chrome DevTools (F12), inspect a comment element, update the values below, and click 'Reload Selectors' in Settings > Selectors (no app restart needed).
notes: role=article is Facebook's long-standing semantic wrapper for feed/comment items; username/text selectors are an ordered fallback chain tried in turn until one yields text.
